Appearances:
Plaintiff Siobahan Johnston is present. Represented by Donal McSweeney.
Attorney Cindy Lee, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Linda Walker is present.
Attorney Eric Wiesner representing the defendant through limited scope.

The settlement attorney Jason Jungreis, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled per settlement attorney. The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated.
